task: Advanced high-value task: Alarm Fatigue Workload Row Performance Envelope Audit. Scenario: a senior technical lead needs to decide whether to hold, release, retest, or redesign based only on supplied evidence for alarm fatigue workload row. Embedded packet: Records: R1 alarm_frequency=58 actionable_pct=88 response_time_s=1; R2 alarm_frequency=67 actionable_pct=84 response_time_s=4; R3 alarm_frequency=53 actionable_pct=99 response_time_s=0. Remediation options: O1 changes alarm_frequency by -12% cost=86000; O2 changes actionable_pct by -18% cost=101600; O3 changes response_time_s by -25% cost=60400; max_budget=127200. Rules and constraints: actionable<30 and frequency>20 is nuisance; response_time>20 is workload risk; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: evaluate whether the supplied remediation options are relevant, affordable, and sufficient to change the final decision. Deliver alarm_fatigue_1.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
